title: Automated Quantification of Drosophila Male Aggression Using Motion and Inter-fly Distance
description: Analysis and preprocessing code for the Aggression-Associated Frame Ratio (AAFR), an automated measure of male-male aggression in Drosophila melanogaster based on frame-to-frame motion (ΔI) and inter-fly distance (Dt). This repository accompanies the paper of the same title.
